feed.title: Single-Family Home Under Contract in Banning Ranch Area of Newport Beach
feed.summary: A single-family home located at 22 Sand Dollar Court, within the Banning Ranch area of Newport Beach, California, was recently listed as 'Under Contract'. The property, featuring 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, was listed for $950,000, indicating ongoing real estate activity in the vicinity.
feed.source: Sotheby's International Realty / eXp Realty of California Inc.

feed.title: Randall Preserve Seeks Stewardship Technician for Ongoing Operations
feed.summary: The Nature Conservancy is actively recruiting for a Randall Preserve Stewardship Technician. This role involves leading work teams for habitat restoration, managing ecological land and infrastructure, and interacting with community stakeholders, ensuring the implementation of the preserve management plan. The position signifies ongoing efforts in preserve operations and conservation programs.
feed.source: The Nature Conservancy / Conservation Careers / JobLeads.com

feed.title: Randall Preserve Advisory Committee Reviews Draft Recreation and Open Space Plan
feed.summary: The Randall Preserve Advisory Committee recently convened to review and discuss a draft recreation and open space plan for the preserve. This plan details proposed public access, including seven miles of trails designed to protect diverse wetland wildlife while opening pristine outdoor spaces to the public. Plans also include connecting Talbert Regional Park to enhance regional accessibility.
